source.body_text_sample:
Skip to content
ABOUT US
WHAT WE DO
YOU CAN HELP
CONTACT US
FIND HELP
DONATE
SEARCH
JOIN OUR TEAM

Build brighter tomorrows with FSGV.

At Family Services of Greater Vancouver, our staff, volunteers, and interns are making a difference every single day. FSGV supports victims and survivors, families, and youth with programs, services, and supports that are trauma-informed and client-led. If you want to pursue your passion while working toward a mission aligned with your values, we invite you to apply today! 

FSGV is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. If you require a disability-related accommodation to participate in the recruitment process, please read the job posting for more information. 

CAREERS AND VOLUNTEER POSITIONS

Current job and volunteer postings can be found on our Careers page.

Check us out on Glassdoor!

INTERNSHIPS

Current internship opportunities are listed on our Internships page.

If none are listed, please check back at a later date.  

KEEP IN TOUCH

We gratefully acknowledge that our programs are delivered on traditional and ancestral lands and waters. Click to read our commitment to reconciliation, justice, and equity.

WE’D LOVE TO HEAR FROM YOU

604 731 4951 | contactus@fsgv.ca

East Broadway Office 301-1638 E Broadway, Vancouver, BC V5N 1W1
